tests.name: test_outputs.py::test_i8_tampered_snapshot_rejected
tests.trace:
report = {'cases': [{'adjacency': 0, 'after_total': [1.98, 1.75, 1.7429999999999999], 'balanced': True, 'base_match': True, ......acency': 0, 'after_total': [2.29, 1.6689999999999998, 1.7520000000000002], 'balanced': True, 'base_match': True, ...}]}

    def test_i8_tampered_snapshot_rejected(report):
        """a tampered snapshot is rejected with a mismatched-signature line."""
        assert AUDIT_LOG.exists()
        text = AUDIT_LOG.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
        rejected = [ln for ln in text.splitlines()
                    if "REJECTED" in ln and "SIGNATURE_MISMATCH" in ln]
>       assert len(rejected) >= 1
E       assert 0 >= 1
E        +  where 0 = len([])
